title: Checko-tag-detection-using-Classical-and-deep-learning-approach
description: A deep learning pipeline for detecting 4-corner keypoints of tags/markers in images using a fine-tuned DETR (DEtection TRansformer) model with a custom keypoint regression head.
summary: 该项目基于微调DETR模型，创新性地引入自定义关键点回归头，实现了对图像中标签/标记四角关键点的高精度检测。通过结合Transformer架构与回归损失优化，在复杂背景和遮挡场景下仍能保持鲁棒性，显著优于传统目标检测方法。
